body:
Amara, following up on our exchange about the [Halfway Capital](orgs/halfway-capital) pipeline — I've been thinking more about the two climate infra deals you mentioned, and I'd love to find time this week to dig into the unit economics together. Benchmark has been leaning harder into grid-edge software lately, and there's at least one company in your current cohort that looks like it could be a strong co-investment candidate for us. Would Thursday or Friday afternoon work for a 30-minute call? Happy to send over a calendar invite once we confirm.

Leo
